gold: Anna, hesap ekstresi istiyorum. Son seneni, 2024 yılının ocak aralık arasındaki hesap ekstresini istiyorum.

sigWerErrors.reason: 'Anna' is a name/address to a person, while 'Anlayış' means 'understanding' in Turkish. This substitution changes the meaning and context of the sentence significantly.
'Seneni' is a typo or mishearing of 'senenin' (of the year). The intended meaning is preserved, so this is a minor error.
'Ocak' (January) is replaced with 'ocak-aralık' (January-December), which changes the time range being requested. This alters the meaning of the request.
The word 'aralık' (December) is omitted, but since 'ocak-aralık' was inserted earlier, the time range is still covered. This deletion does not affect the overall meaning.
